headline: Education Ministry Spends 16% of Budget on Administration Not Teaching
context: Parliamentary analysis reveals MOE spends RM9.2 billion of its RM57 billion budget on administrative overhead.

cards.big: RM9.2 billion or 16% of MOE budget goes to administration not classroom teaching
cards.sub: Malaysia's education admin overhead is double the OECD average of 8%

cards.big: MOE has 14 departments and 16 state education offices with overlapping functions
cards.sub: Restructuring proposals submitted in 2018 and 2022 were not implemented

cards.big: 68,000 non-teaching staff in MOE compared to 420,000 teachers in 2025
cards.sub: 1 administrator for every 6 teachers represents significant overhead

cards.big: New Zealand reduced education admin costs 40% through school-level autonomy reforms
cards.sub: Decentralized management eliminated redundant layers of bureaucracy

cards.big: Every ringgit spent on bureaucracy is a ringgit stolen from the classroom
Should MOE undergo structural reform to redirect admin savings to teaching resources
